1747630.name: For The Hive
1747630.description:
For The Hive – A Brutal, Gory Insect Survival Experience

For The Hive is an intense insect survival simulation blending exploration, role-playing, and strategic warfare. Enter a vast, living world where every creature fights to survive—just like you.

Brutal, Gory Combat

Survival isn’t just about running—it’s about fighting. Rip enemies apart, decapitate foes, and dismember rivals in fast-paced, bloody battles. Every encounter is a struggle for dominance, with no mercy for the weak.

A Beautiful and Immersive World

Venture through a stunning, ever-changing ecosystem with a full day-night cycle. Climb towering trees, scale plants and rocks, or dive into the depths of hidden caves. Every inch of the world is yours to explore—but danger lurks everywhere.

Start as a Tiny Larva – Grow Into a Legend

Begin life as a helpless larva and fight to survive as you grow into a mighty queen, a towering beetle, or one of over 20 different species. Each insect has its own unique abilities, strengths, and playstyle.

Mating & Legacy – Build Your Family

Survival isn’t just about you—find a mate, build your colony, and continue your bloodline. Play as your offspring and shape the future of your species, ensuring your lineage thrives for generations.

Join a Faction – Wage War

Ally yourself with powerful insect factions and take part in massive territorial battles. Whether you conquer, defend, or forge alliances, your choices will shape the world around you.

Live the Life of an Insect

Hunt for food, gather resources, and stay alive by eating, sleeping, and even cleaning yourself. From lone survivalist to colony leader, carve your place in a world where only the fittest thrive.

Do you have what it takes to rule the wild?

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
